rationale: The cited paper is used in the methods section to justify concrete conjoint design choices in the citing paper's experiment, specifically the orthogonal half-fraction setup and blocked profile assignment. This is not a broad background mention; it is tied to how the experiment was constructed. Although the citation appears only once and in a grouped citation, the local text makes its methodological role explicit.
relation_description: The citing paper applies the cited paper as a methodological precedent for designing its conjoint experiment, using it to support the factorial profile construction and blocking procedure in a new B2B buying-group context.
